Emergency Settlement Conference Re: Restitution
Off Calendar Dec-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: 12-6-06 Clerk: F. Yokota Reporter: P. Van Steenberge
Present in court were defendant's Father with counsel John Kao, Mike Kissinger, Sonya Nelson (parents of victim in the juvenile case below). Pltff Kissinger requested an oral emergency settlement conference hearing in dept. 405 before Judge Hitchens and his request was granted. The parties stipulate to a settlement in this case for restitution in juvenile case JW03-6316, in the amount of $145,000.00 to be paid in a lump sum to Pltff and/or pltff's son (victim) in 30 days from 12-6-06 or until completion of home equity loan to be processed by defendant's parents to obtain amount of settlement. The Dismissal of Juvenile appeal and this civil case will take place upon full payment of settlement.
